title: Soft Crochet Daisy
description: A bright yellow and white crochet daisy made with soft cotton yarn. Perfect for beginners learning flower motifs.

title: Chunky Winter Scarf
description: A thick, cozy scarf knitted with bulky yarn. Great for cold weather and simple enough for new knitters.

title: Origami Crane
description: A traditional origami crane folded from patterned Japanese washi paper. Symbolizes peace and good fortune.

title: Hand‑Stitched Floral Embroidery
description: A delicate floral embroidery piece using satin stitch and French knots. Ideal for decorating tote bags or clothing.

title: Mini Clay Mushroom
description: A tiny clay mushroom sculpture painted with acrylics. Great for terrariums, desk decor, or keychains.

title: Watercolor Sunset Landscape
description: A soft watercolor sunset blending warm oranges and cool purples. Uses wet‑on‑wet technique for smooth gradients.

title: DIY Upcycled Glass Jar
description: A recycled glass jar turned into a decorative storage container using twine, paint, and dried flowers.

title: Laser‑Cut Wooden Bookmark
description: A laser‑cut wooden bookmark featuring a leaf pattern. Lightweight, durable, and perfect for book lovers.

title: Handmade Resin Keychain
description: A clear resin keychain with embedded dried flowers and gold flakes. Polished for a glossy finish.

title: Paper Quilling Flower
description: A colorful paper‑quilled flower made from tightly rolled strips. Great for greeting cards and wall art.
